# Figure description: Тектоническая_карта.jpg

**Source**: `36572_Smolianova_1984/raw_graphics/Общие_данные_для_всех_листов/Тектоническая_карта.jpg`  
**Generated by**: claude-sonnet-4-6

---

## Figure Type

This is a **tectonic scheme (tectonic map)** — a structural-geological map showing the tectonic framework, structural units, fold and fault systems, intrusive bodies, and stratigraphic formations of a region. It is a composite figure assembled from multiple map sheets joined together, with an accompanying multi-column legend. The map is drawn at **1:500,000 scale** (Масштаб 1:500 000).

---

## Coverage and Subject

The map covers the **western part of the Teniz Depression (Тенизская впадина) and its framing (обрамление)** — a major sedimentary basin structure in **northern Kazakhstan**. The title reads:

> **ТЕКТОНИЧЕСКАЯ СХЕМА западной части Тенизской впадины и её обрамления**

The map was compiled in **1984** ("1984 г.") and is labeled **Чертёж 440** (Drawing/Sheet 440). It is attributed to the **Западно-Тенизская ПСП** (West-Teniz Production Seismic Party), compiled by геолог (geologist) **Смолянова Е.М.** ("Составил геолог Смолянова Е.М."). The figure is linked to Report 36572. Geographic references visible include **м. Тепло** (a locality name), and Roman numeral zone labels (I through V or more) are visible on the map surface. The map covers an area consistent with parts of map sheets **M-42** and **N-42**.

---

## Key Content

### Structural Framework
The map depicts a complex tectonic picture with several orders of structural subdivision:

**VI – Структуры 1 порядка (First-order structures):**
Named regional uplifts, synforms, and platforms, including:
- Нассамбайский синклинорий (Nassambay synclinorium)
- Тениз-Кустанайская группа
- Тенизский синклинорий
- Чишминский выступ

**Структуры 2 порядка (Second-order structures) for the Teniz Depression and Ishim Trough:**
- Антиклинали (anticlines): Натальевская, Центрально-Тенизская, Южно-Майбалыкская, Шиндигерская, Аулиекольская, Южно-Тарангульская, Сынтасская, Ново-Никольская, Восточно-Сынтасская, Богстинская-Шафдарская, Привальная, Павловская, Тандырская, Ново-Успенская, Тагдинская, восточно-тагдинская, Алтыбасская, Майковская (Тарстинская), Новотроицкая, Майбалыкская (Западная), Новобеловская, Малобеловская, Жакобенская
- Синклинали (synclines): Джантекесорская, Кинево-Тарангульская, Сарыдинская, Горьковская, and others

**Массивы интрузий (Intrusive massifs – III order):**
- Карагандинский, Обалинский, Снетбайский (Тастинский), Досмухамбетовский, Ахметовский, Дарменовский, Шолакский, Зайсанский, Таукольский, Нурлытауский, Тариповский

### Colours and Patterns
The map uses a rich colour scheme:
- **Pink/rose tones**: Areas of Caledonian folded basement and activation zones (гранитные интрузии, various structural stages)
- **Orange/salmon**: Hercynian intrusions and specific formation types
- **Purple/violet**: Sub-platform complex, Devonian–Carboniferous marine sequences
- **Light beige/cream**: Sedimentary cover sequences (terrigenous, carbonate–terrigenous formations)
- **Dotted patterns**: Terrigenous–carbonate–terrigenous formations; grey-green terrigenous units
- **Cross-hatching**: Granitoids and intrusive bodies
- **Pink stippled**: Volcanic-terrigenous formation areas

Structural contour lines (isolines) define dome-like and elongated anticlinal closures throughout the depression. Numerous closed oval and elongated contour patterns represent **anticlines** — the primary hydrocarbon and ore-hosting structures.

### Fault Systems
Bold lines with tick marks indicate **regional faults** (главные региональные разломы), with additional symbols for:
- Deep regional faults
- Structural boundaries
- Fold axes
- Boundaries of structural subdivisions

### Legend Structure (Three Columns)
The legend is extensive and divided into:

**Column I – Folded basement complexes:**
- Области байкальской складчатости (Baikalian folding zones)
- Области каледонской складчатости (Caledonian folding zones), subdivided into:
  - 1st structural stage (Cl₁): Tutguran suite, Nandaika suite
  - 2nd structural stage (Cl₂): subduction granites, Adaliya complex; volcanic-terrigenous formation; Valshambay (saliniferous) limestone
  - 3rd structural stage (Cl₃): Vissembet, Baidzhansay formations; intrusions of normal composition (Веховские); rhyodacite-terrigenous formations (Biakino-Terigenous); Valshambay limestone
- Области герцинской складчатости (Hercynian folding zones):
  - Sub-platform complex, Devonian marine sediments, Devonian horizon, Tournaisian–Visean complex

**Column II – Volcanic-sedimentary formations:**
- Кремнисто-туфогенно-базальтовая формация (Siliceous-tuffaceous-basalt)
- Базальто-туфогенная формация (Bas
